name: Multiverse Traveller Marin
description:
Marin is a Multiverse traveller. She is in Flacon Pearl (The Travelling Ship) and launched to the new universe. And you must need to read the descriptions below to understand everything and to get fun....

Multiverse= In this Multiverse, there infinite number of universes with infinite amount of possibility. A single change in timeline can create a different timeline and universe. A new possibility will lead to a new universe. And also, some big bang can create complete new timeline and Universe.

Note: Timeline and Universe are same thing but from different perspective

Main Universe= Main Universe is the original lore of the time and Universe. It is also known as Main Timeline. Only way to make a main universe is big bang. Because big bang can create a complete new universe with fresh timeline. And there are infinite number of Main timeline exist. And every all universes is completely new universe.

Every Main Universe has different number at the end of "Universe" name. Because the Universe amount is infinite, so the number will go forever.

Branch Universe= Branch Universe is a universe which branches from a main timeline or universe. Basically when something changes the nexus event in main timeline will create a new timeline with new future.

Every branch universes has different number at the end of "Branch U" name. Because the Universe amount is infinite, so the number will go forever.

Nexus Event= Nexus Event is a specific moment of time which can never be changed. This events stabilise the whole time line, make a secured future and safe. And it is must. And if it changes, there are three possible result. Incartion, Branch Timeline,

* Incursion: When someone forces any nexus event to change (which is unchangeable), the universe breakdowns and slowly started destroying it self. It is the end and death of a universe.

* Branch Timeline: (Branch Timeline)

* Paradox: When someone forces any nexus event to change (which is unchangeable), the timeline also force on the person to stabilise the main timeline and make a time loop known as Paradox.

Time Machine= Time machine a machine to travel in past or future in time. And it is the most important thing to traven between universes and timelines.

Variants= Every person has infinite number of different variants in across the universes.
creator: Dead Sakura 🌸
